item.cbbees.portable_beehive.tooltip.sum: Allows carrying _Mechanical Bees_ and _Upgrades_. When equipped in the _back slot_, it enables coordinating construction tasks using the swarm.
item.cbbees.portable_beehive.tooltip.beh: Acts as a mobile _Mechanical Beehive_, allowing bees to be deployed from the player's position.
Opens the _Beehive inventory_ to manage bees and upgrades.
Use _Honey Bottles_ in off hand to refill the backpack.
item.cbbees.mechanical_bee.tooltip.summa: A wind-up _autonomous worker_ that can _place_ and _break_ blocks. Insert into a _Mechanical Beehive_ via a _Funnel_ to deploy.
item.cbbees.mechanical_bee.tooltip.behav: Flies to _Logistics Ports_ to gather materials, then places blocks at the target location.
Returns to the _Beehive_ to await a new task or recharge its _spring_.
item.cbbees.mechanical_bumble_bee.toolti: A larger _mechanical bee_ specialized in _item transport_. Shuttles items between _Cargo Ports_ with matching frequencies.
Picks up items from _provider_ Cargo Ports and delivers them to _requesting_ Cargo Ports.
Carries up to _3 stacks_ of items at once, compared to a regular bee's single slot.
gui.cbbees.logistics.port_mode.title: Pickup mode
gui.cbbees.logistics.priority.title: Priority (Higher = more important)
item.cbbees.mechanical_beehive.tooltip.s: The Mechanical Beehive coordinates large-scale construction and maintenance tasks by deploying Mechanical Bees. Requires rotational power to operate.
tooltip.cbbees.bee.description: Place in beehive to deploy for construction
tooltip.cbbees.bee.consumed_on_deploy: Bees leave the hive to work, and return when done
tooltip.cbbees.mechanical_bumble_bee.des: Place in beehive for logistics transport
tooltip.cbbees.planner.description: Right-click to set Corner 1. Shift+Right-click to set Corner 2.
tooltip.cbbees.upgrade.honey_efficiency: Bees have increased carry capacity, break speed and honey efficiency
tooltip.cbbees.upgrade.drop_items: Bees drop items on deconstruction instead of picking them up
cbbees.construction.already_active: This area is already being worked on!
cbbees.construction.no_beehive: No bee source found in range! (Equip a backpack or stand near a beehive)
cbbees.construction.out_of_range: Target area is too far away!
cbbees.construction.no_tasks: No blocks to place in schematic!
cbbees.deconstruction.title: Stinger Planner
cbbees.deconstruction.already_active: This area is already being deconstructed!
cbbees.deconstruction.no_blocks: No blocks to remove in selected area!
ponder.cbbees.buzzy_bees.title: Buzzy Bees
ponder.cbbees.buzzy_bees.description: Automated construction and deconstruction with mechanical bees
ponder.cbbees.mechanical_bee.title: Introduction to Mechanical Bees
ponder.cbbees.portable_beehive.title: The Portable Beehive
cbbees.ponder.mechanical_beehive.text_1: The Mechanical Beehive is the heart of your mechanical bees.
cbbees.ponder.mechanical_beehive.text_2: Bees will spawn from it when a new task is available. Bees will also return to their hives when there are no more tasks.
cbbees.ponder.mechanical_beehive.text_3: A funnel can be used to insert bees into your beehives.
cbbees.ponder.mechanical_beehive.text_4: A Beehive's range is shown when looking at it. It scales with the supplied RPM.
cbbees.ponder.mechanical_beehive_network: Mechanical Beehives will generate a unique network ID when placed.
The range of a Beehive also determines its network range. Any hive placed in that range will join the same network.
Hives extend the range of your network.
All hives in a network can contribute to the same task. Closer hives are prioritized.
Ports can join the network when placed inside its range.
Ports placed outside of the range can't be accessed by bees.
cbbees.ponder.logistics_port.text_1: The Logistics Port can be placed on any kind of inventory. A green bulb means it can interact with the inventory.
cbbees.ponder.logistics_port.text_2: You can switch the port type to INSERT, by interacting with a wrench, to make it accept items.
cbbees.ponder.logistics_port_with_bees.t: When a bee is spawned to work on a task, it will automatically find a Logistics Port to gather its items. Ports with a higher priority will be preferred.
When a bee focuses on a port, it will start moving towards it, the port will signal this with a glowing bulb.
The bee will pick up the items from the port and then fly to its destination.
When finished, the bee will look for a new task or fly back to its hive.
cbbees.ponder.cargo_port_intro.text_1: The Cargo Port is used to move items around your network using the Mechanical Bumble Bee.
cbbees.ponder.cargo_port_intro.text_2: The Cargo Port can be placed on any kind of inventory. A green bulb means it can interact with the inventory.
cbbees.ponder.cargo_port_intro.text_3: You can switch the port type to INSERT, by interacting with a wrench, to make it accept items.
cbbees.ponder.cargo_port_with_bees.text_: Cargo ports can be configured for a certain frequency.
When cargo ports have matching frequencies, a line will be displayed between them.
When a Cargo Port is placed inside a network, it will periodically scan for new items.
When a new item is detected, a new task will be created for pickup.
A Mechanical Bumble Bee will pick it up and bring it to the closest matching requesting Cargo Port.
cbbees.ponder.mechanical_bee.text_1: Mechanical Bees have an internal spring, which is consumed when flying and finishing tasks.
cbbees.ponder.mechanical_bee.text_2: The spring is recharged when empty at the Bees spawn hive.
cbbees.ponder.mechanical_bee.text_3: The Mechanical Bee can place/destroy blocks.
cbbees.ponder.mechanical_bee.text_4: The Mechanical Bumble Bee can pick up items from cargo ports and transport them to other Cargo Ports.
gui.cbbees.construction_planner.title: Schematic Browser
gui.cbbees.tool.unselect.desc: Right-click to clear schematic and return to picker
cbbees.construction.requires_planner: Hold a Construction Planner to start construction!
gui.cbbees.group_picker.title: Select Group
gui.cbbees.schematic_rename.title: Rename Schematic
gui.cbbees.schematic_delete.title: Delete Schematic
gui.cbbees.browse_online.title: Browse Schematics Online
gui.cbbees.browse_online.select_hint: Select a schematic to see details
gui.cbbees.browse_online.author: By %s
item.cbbees.construction_planner.tooltip: A reusable tool for selecting and deploying _Schematics_ for bee construction. Hold [Alt] to browse available schematics.
Displays an inline _HUD_ for browsing schematics. Use _Scroll_ to cycle, _R-Click_ to select.
Shows a _ghost preview_ of the structure. Use the _Construct_ tool to deploy the swarm.
_Instantly_ deploys the schematic at the crosshair position.
item.cbbees.deconstruction_planner.toolt: Selects an area to be _dismantled_ by the bee swarm. Blocks are broken and dropped as items.
_R-Click_ to set corners of the selection area. _Ctrl+Scroll_ to resize.
Press the _Deploy_ key to send the deconstruction swarm.
item.cbbees.upgrade_template.tooltip.sum: A base component used to craft _Bee Upgrades_. Combine with specialized materials on a crafting table to create upgrades for your _Portable Beehive_.
item.cbbees.rapid_wings.tooltip.summary: Increases _movement_ and _work speed_ of all deployed bees by _25%_ per upgrade. Install in the _Portable Beehive_.
item.cbbees.rapid_wings.tooltip.behaviou: Up to _4_ can be installed in a single beehive.
item.cbbees.swarm_intelligence.tooltip.s: Allows _8 additional_ bees to work simultaneously per upgrade. Install in the _Portable Beehive_.
item.cbbees.swarm_intelligence.tooltip.b: Up to _3_ can be installed in a single beehive.
item.cbbees.honey_efficiency.tooltip.sum: Increases _carry capacity_, _break speed_, and reduces _honey consumption_ per upgrade. Install in the _Portable Beehive_.
item.cbbees.honey_efficiency.tooltip.beh: Up to _2_ can be installed in a single beehive.
item.cbbees.soft_touch.tooltip.summary: Deconstruction preserves blocks _intact_ instead of destroying them. Deconstructed blocks are returned as their original item. Install in the _Portable Beehive_.
item.cbbees.soft_touch.tooltip.behaviour: Only _1_ can be installed per beehive.
item.cbbees.drop_items.tooltip.summary: Bees _drop items_ on the ground after breaking blocks instead of picking them up. Skips the return trip, making deconstruction _much faster_. Install in the _Portable Beehive_.
item.cbbees.drop_items.tooltip.behaviour: Only _1_ can be installed per beehive.
gui.cbbees.job_detail.title: Construction Job
item.cbbees.honey_tank.tooltip.summary: Increases the _honey storage capacity_ of the Portable Beehive by _200_ per upgrade. Install in the _Portable Beehive_.
item.cbbees.honey_tank.tooltip.behaviour: Up to _2_ can be installed in a single beehive.
item.cbbees.reinforced_plating.tooltip.s: Increases _spring efficiency_ by _25%_ per upgrade, allowing bees to work longer before needing to recharge. Install in the _Portable Beehive_.
item.cbbees.reinforced_plating.tooltip.b: Up to _2_ can be installed in a single beehive.
item.cbbees.drone_view.tooltip.summary: Enables a top-down _drone camera_ by consuming a bee from the backpack. Press _V_ to toggle the elevated view for planning schematics. Use _WASD_ to fly the drone within range.
item.cbbees.drone_view.tooltip.behaviour: Only _1_ can be installed per beehive.
cbbees.drone_view.hud.controls: WASD to fly | V to exit
item.cbbees.drone_range.tooltip.summary: Extends the maximum range of the _Drone View_ camera by _16 blocks_ per upgrade. Allows scouting further from the player.
item.cbbees.drone_range.tooltip.behaviou: Up to _3_ can be installed in a single beehive.
